---
title: 'catalog info'
---

Show summary metadata for the active catalog: filesystem path, current commit,
configured remotes, and entry/alias counts.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog info
```

This command takes no command-specific options. To target a particular catalog,
use the catalog group's selectors:

```bash
xorq catalog --name my-catalog info
xorq catalog --path /path/to/catalog/repo info
```

## Example output

```text
path:    /Users/me/.xorq/catalogs/default
commit:  3f7c1ad94b2e
remotes: origin
entries: 42
aliases: 7
```

For per-entry metadata, use [`catalog show`](show.qmd) or [`catalog schema`](schema.qmd).
